2606.31435.title: CDR-Bench: Evaluating Faithful Execution of Compositional, Order-Sensitive Data Refinement Recipes
2606.31435.paper_summary: Data refinement involves executing multi-step recipes over evolving text states, where both composition and execution order of processing operators determine the outcome. While existing benchmarks either isolate text editing or entangle it with code and tool execution, it remains unclear whether LLMs can directly and faithfully execute these compositional, order-sensitive data refinement recipes. To fill this gap, we introduce CDR-Bench, a comprehensive benchmark featuring 3,462 high-quality tasks spanning four real-world data refinement domains and 29 distinct operators. Our benchmark evaluates models across atomic, order-agnostic, and order-sensitive settings, leveraging deterministic reference outputs to enable exact evaluation. Experiments on 10+ state-of-the-art LLMs reveal consistent failure patterns: performance degrades sharply in compositional settings, and order-sensitive recipe success collapses. These findings underline that current LLMs lack the procedural faithfulness required for reliable compositional data refinement.
2606.31435.paper_summary_zh: 資料精煉涉及在不斷變化的文本狀態上執行多步驟的配方，其中處理運算子的組合和執行順序決定了結果。雖然現有基準要麼孤立文本編輯，要麼將其與代碼和工具執行交織在一起，但尚不清楚大型語言模型（LLMs）是否能夠直接且忠實地執行這些組合性、對順序敏感的資料精煉配方。為了填補這一空白，我們介紹了CDR-Bench，這是一個全面的基準，包含3,462個高質量任務，涵蓋四個現實世界的資料精煉領域和29個不同的運算子。我們的基準在原子、無序和對順序敏感的設置中評估模型，利用確定性參考輸出來實現精確評估。在10多個最先進的LLMs上進行的實驗顯示出一致的失敗模式：在組合性設置中性能急劇下降，對順序敏感的配方成功率崩潰。這些發現強調了當前的LLMs缺乏可靠的組合性資料精煉所需的程序忠實性。
2606.31435.author: Yuchen Huang et.al.
2606.31435.authors: Yuchen Huang, Xiang Li, Zhenqing Ling, Sijia Li, Qianli Shen, Daoyuan Chen, Yi R. Fung, Yaliang Li
